subcodes.first_line: The waves of the Ocean of Utterance, by the will of the Lord of all possibility, have manifested in the form of these words throughout many years [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امواج بحر بیان باراده مالک امکان بر هیئت اینکلمات ظاهر در اکثر از سنین
subcodes.subjects: @mystery of the great reversal, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
